title: Video by worldfloorballgoalieacademy
description:
Great drill to include in your training or even as a warm-up⚡

Especially for younger goalies‼️because it’s very demanding on coordination and helps build the right movement habits early on🏆

In this drill we focus on proper hockey movement technique + keeping the hands ready for reaction:

You react to the light → move with correct technique → get back to center → and finish with a save🧤

Catch your dream! 🔥 #catchyourdream
